input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.3.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.3.9
            TITLE: vehicle integrity

            CONTENT:
            rule D.3.9: Vehicle Integrity
D.3.9 Vehicle Integrity 
Officials may revoke the Inspection Approval for any vehicle condition that could compromise 
vehicle integrity, compromise the track surface, or pose a potential hazard.   
This could result in DNF or DQ of any Dynamic event.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 127 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Rule D.3.9: Vehicle Integrity Officials may revoke the Inspection Approval for any vehicle condition that could compromise vehicle integrity, compromise the track surface, or pose a potential hazard. This could result in DNF or DQ of any Dynamic event.
